experiment.description: Baseline experiment comparing inline HTML, inline JSON, local function calling, local MCP, and remote MCP context provisioning over Lattes curricula.
associatedPapers: Evaluating Context Provisioning Strategies for LLM-Based Systems: An Empirical Study with the Lattes Platform
LLMContextBench: A Benchmark Tool for Evaluating Context Provisioning Strategies in LLM-Based Systems

software.name: LLMContextBench
software.role: Exact software snapshot used to execute the Lattes baseline
software.versionDescription: The software version bound to this experiment is the complete snapshot stored in tools/llmcontextbench-lattes.zip. This embedded archive, rather than the current state of the external source repository, is the authoritative software version for reproducing baseline_001.

dataset.name: LLMContextBench Lattes dataset
dataset.role: Exact dataset snapshot used by the Lattes baseline
dataset.versionDescription: The dataset version bound to this experiment is the complete snapshot stored in datasets/lattes.tar.gz. This embedded archive is the authoritative dataset version for reproducing baseline_001.

reproducibilityNotes: The committed JSON, JSONL, CSV, and trace artifacts are the preserved outputs of the original baseline execution.
The original output artifacts use the historical vocabulary queries.jsonl, answers.jsonl, runId, questionId, and mcp.
A newer LLMContextBench release may use different command and artifact names. It must not be substituted silently when claiming exact reproduction of this baseline.
A full re-execution depends on external model providers and on a compatible MCP endpoint; provider updates may cause results to differ from the preserved baseline outputs.
